case_title: YU QIANG ZHAO VS. MALKIT SINGH THIARA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-15-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-15-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF YU QIANG ZHAO APPEARED, WITH THE ASSISTANCE OF CANTONESE INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT MALIT SINGH THIARA APPEARED, WITH THE ASSISTANCE OF PUNJABI INTERPRETER DAVINDER DHINDSA. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. BOTH PARTIES' EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE JOHN TRUE, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHAO, YU QIANG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THIARA, MALKIT SINGH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY ZHAO, YU QIANG AS TO DEFENDANT THIARA, MALKIT SINGH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-15-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZHAO, YU QIANG ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $ 100.00 SERVED SEP-16-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THIARA, MALKIT SINGH
